title: Nature's Edge : DragonHearth Adventure
description: Modpack in the Age of Dragons, breeding, hunters, observer.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c2e3e752197bde35cf7973085bb7b456096d3a2.png)
![dd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34fd7e4b15783ad6e8d92ae9cc3bfa27032721ba.png)
Dragon enthusiasts, intrepid hunters or simply fascinated observers, this modpack is specially designed for dragon lovers. It offers a new generation of worlds for a total immersion in the quest for these majestic creatures. And for create mod lovers, integrate your adventure into this captivating universe.

Link your destiny to that of the dragons: tame them and make them your traveling companions. To achieve this, you will have to obtain an egg by defeating one of the three elemental dragons (Ice, Fire, Electricity). Be careful, these creatures are formidable, so prepare yourself carefully and develop an effective strategy to defeat them.

Also explore the dragon nests in search of scrolls revealing their secrets, and beware of other hostile creatures hiding in the new structures of this world.

If you need help understanding how the modpack works, you have a [Wiki](https://documentation.natures-edge.eu/dragonhearth-adventure) For all the essential elements to start your adventure

If you want to relax with some draconic music, use this video and have fun at the same time. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1DokJjOwymM&list=RD1DokJjOwymM&start_radio=1

![mb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26a80f9eaffcbbd2b456a492c8fd2357e0739345.png)
- Ice Dragon (Ice element)
- Electric Dragon (Electric Element)
- Fire Dragon (Fire element)

- Hippogryphus
- Goregone
- fairy
- cyclops
- Siren
- Sea horse
- Death worm
- Basil
- Stymphalian bird
- Troll
- Myrmex worker
- Private Myrmex
- Queen Myrmex

- Royal Myrmex
- more...

![rs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/096fbb951e29b14142313f2623c9957ab3b30a7c.png)
The modpack's resource packs align with the world of dragons and include a mod, Distant Horizon, that expands your field of vision for an even wider and more spectacular immersion

![mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80732868822248c0fde20d637ce4bf6421451454.png)

- Naturalist

- Sound physics remastered

- More...
